variant_name: 陆姝仪 — 失贞疑案哭诉时
trigger: 高府厢房事件后，陆姝仪衣冠不整卷入疑案，并在正厅哭诉自己被高令宁设计失贞。

appearance_delta.face: 面上惊惶失措，哭得更狠，眼鼻泛红，呈现强烈受害者神态
appearance_delta.body: 体态更狼狈，因惊吓与哭诉显得摇摇欲坠
appearance_delta.hair: 发髻散乱程度明显，符合厢房事件后被撞见的混乱状态
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 散乱衣襟与失控落泪形成极具冲击力的受害现场感，也是她操纵同情的重要外化

costume_override.outfit: 原本清雅的浅色襦裙在厢房风波后变得衣襟凌乱、不够整齐，保留世家小姐底色但带事故痕迹

visual_reference: realistic historical chinese drama style, distressed ancient chinese beauty in disheveled pale hanfu, pale skin, red-rimmed watery eyes, tear-streaked face, slim fragile body, messy black hair and loosened bun, clothing slightly disordered after a scandal, standing in a tense noble hall at night, appearing victimized yet secretly strategic, dramatic candlelight
